decide, I'm not interested right now and they just keep scrolling, well, obviously that's not engagement either. So what I recommend doing instead is something called DM automation, direct message automation, where instead of telling people, go click the link in my bio, your call to action is going to be something along the lines of comment the word coach, and I will send you the link to my new coaching offers. Comment the word me, and I will send you a special discount code for my upcoming mastermind. Let's walk through what's going on here. If people are uninterested, it's the same as before. But now if they are interested, if they do want to sign up or learn more, they do want to get the discount code or the link or whatever, instead of abandoning your post and leaving it behind, they're commenting a specific keyword. You can either manually respond to those people, send them a direct message, send them the link, send them the discount code, whatever it may be, or you can use a tool like DM automation, which is provided by a few different services, where you can automatically send them the link or the discount code or whatever it is that they are looking for. DM automation is the future of selling on Instagram. And it's how you can turn your worst performing posts, which are typically your sales posts, into your best performing content.
